channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Iran's Kurdish opposition in Iraq sees a chance for change after decades in exile
item.description: One of the biggest targets of Iranian attacks has been in Iraq, against armed Iranian opposition bases in the Kurdistan region. Many opposition fighters see this moment as an chance to go home.
item.content:encoded: One of the biggest targets of Iranian attacks has been in Iraq, against armed Iranian opposition bases in the Kurdistan region. Many opposition fighters see this moment as an chance to go home.
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: How a stranger encouraged a father struggling with his daughter's health issues
item.description: A man who was trying to support his daughter with an undiagnosed disorder received praise from a stranger. He said it changed their life.
item.content:encoded: A man who was trying to support his daughter with an undiagnosed disorder received praise from a stranger. He said it changed their life.

item.title: New online game 'Five Nights at Epstein's' has parents and schools concerned
item.description: A video game has captured kids' attentions. It's called Five Nights at Epstein's — and the goal is to survive multiple nights on Jeffrey Epstein's island unscathed.
item.content:encoded: A video game has captured kids' attentions. It's called Five Nights at Epstein's — and the goal is to survive multiple nights on Jeffrey Epstein's island unscathed.
item.dc:creator: Kathryn Fink

item.title: Navigating dementia in a long and loving marriage
item.description: When a wife or husband gets dementia, it is often the spouse who becomes the caregiver. Warren Kimble says his love for his wife is different now, but still strong.
item.content:encoded: When a wife or husband gets dementia, it is often the spouse who becomes the caregiver. Warren Kimble says his love for his wife is different now, but still strong.
item.dc:creator: Nina Keck

item.title: How the crew of Artemis II reacted to seeing the Moon up close
item.description: As the astronauts of Artemis II pass by the lunar surface, they add to the experiences of other missions that flew to the moon.
item.content:encoded: As the astronauts of Artemis II pass by the lunar surface, they add to the experiences of other missions that flew to the moon.
item.dc:creator: Henry Larson

item.title: Trump provides details behind the dramatic rescue of an American airman trapped in Iran
item.description: President Trump revealed many of the dramatic details on how the U.S. military scrambled to rescue two members of fighter jet that was shot down deep inside Iran.
item.content:encoded: President Trump revealed many of the dramatic details on how the U.S. military scrambled to rescue two members of fighter jet that was shot down deep inside Iran.
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre

item.title: Michigan and Connecticut battle tonight for NCAA men's basketball supremacy
item.description: Michigan and Connecticut take to the court tonight in the title game of the NCAA men's Division 1 basketball tournament.
item.content:encoded: Michigan and Connecticut take to the court tonight in the title game of the NCAA men's Division 1 basketball tournament.
item.dc:creator: Greg Echlin

item.title: Trump doubles down on threats to Iran's civilian infrastructure unless there's a deal
item.description: In press conference that stretched over an hour, President Trump provided details on the rescue of a U.S. airman in Iran, but little information on next steps in Iran war.
item.content:encoded: In press conference that stretched over an hour, President Trump provided details on the rescue of a U.S. airman in Iran, but little information on next steps in Iran war.
item.dc:creator: Matt Ozug

item.title: A new paper says mental health therapists should talk to patients about their AI use
item.description: A new paper in JAMA Psychiatry argues that mental health care providers should ask clients routinely about their use of AI for emotional support and health information.
item.content:encoded: A new paper in JAMA Psychiatry argues that mental health care providers should ask clients routinely about their use of AI for emotional support and health information.
item.dc:creator: Rhitu Chatterjee

item.title: Conservatives and liberals oppose H2A visa changes for immigrant farm workers
item.description: Both the United Farm Workers and the Heritage Foundation oppose the Trump Administration's decision to cut guest worker wages to ease a farm labor crunch exacerbated by deportations.
item.content:encoded: Both the United Farm Workers and the Heritage Foundation oppose the Trump Administration's decision to cut guest worker wages to ease a farm labor crunch exacerbated by deportations.
item.dc:creator: Frank Morris
